rationale: The citing paper’s core contribution is a Bayesian model that links eye-movement attention trajectories to utility accumulation and brand choice prediction, and the cited paper’s core contribution is a hierarchical Bayesian bounded-rationality model that jointly explains eye-tracked information search and final choice. This strong overlap in constructs and modeling focus (eye-tracking, dynamic search/attention, and choice prediction) makes the citation plausibly substantive rather than a generic mention.
